positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for badults_pos
% SZS output start Proof for badults_pos
1. working_title(badults,the_secret_dude_society) [input(axiom)]
2. script_editor(andrew_collins,badults) [input(axiom)]
3. ? [X0] : (script_editor(andrew_collins,X0) & working_title(X0,the_secret_dude_society)) [input(conjecture)]
4. ~? [X0] : (script_editor(andrew_collins,X0) & working_title(X0,the_secret_dude_society)) [negated conjecture 3]
5. ! [X0] : (~script_editor(andrew_collins,X0) | ~working_title(X0,the_secret_dude_society)) [ennf transformation 4]
6. working_title(badults,the_secret_dude_society) [cnf transformation 1]
7. script_editor(andrew_collins,badults) [cnf transformation 2]
8. ~script_editor(andrew_collins,X0) | ~working_title(X0,the_secret_dude_society) [cnf transformation 5]
9. ~working_title(badults,the_secret_dude_society) [resolution 7,8]
10. $false [forward subsumption resolution 9,6]
% SZS output end Proof for badults_pos
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
